overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Star Wars Outlaws showing the protagonist walking through shallow water toward the settlement of Myrra on planet Akiva. The scene transitions from a natural wetland area with monumental ancient stone ruins to a structured sci-fi spaceport dock, featuring cinematic lighting and detailed environmental storytelling.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow wetland with distant ancient ruins

events.description: title card fades revealing the full environment
character begins walking forward through the water

agents.ego_description: standing still in shallow water initially, then beginning to walk while surveying the ancient ruins and mountain landscape ahead

entered.detail: large rocky mountains with tropical vegetation under cloudy skies
distant stone structures partially obscured by mist and trees
dense alien trees and vegetation lining the water's edge
calm reflective water with lily pads covering the surface
massive curved stone structure covered in hanging vines

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a cinematic title card before revealing a wide wetland area on an alien planet. The character stands in shallow water surrounded by tropical vegetation, with distant mountains and ancient ruins visible through the mist. The camera pans right to reveal monumental stone arch structures before the character begins walking forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient ruin waterway with monumental arch structures

events.description: passing between two massive ancient stone arches covered in vegetation
settlement buildings become clearly visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: wading steadily through shallow water toward the distant settlement, passing between the ancient arch structures

entered.detail: large curved stone monument mirroring the left arch, covered in moss and vines
mist rising from a small waterfall between the rocks
sci-fi settlement structures with metallic roofs visible through the haze
green lily pads floating on the water surface around the character

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the shallow waterway between two massive ancient stone arches covered in hanging vegetation. The environment feels like a sacred ruin passage, with mist rising from a distant waterfall. As the character progresses, the settlement of Myrra becomes visible in the distance, transitioning from natural to built environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceport dock approach with industrial walkways

events.description: environment shifts from natural ruins to industrial spaceport architecture
character steps out of water onto concrete dock platform

agents.ego_description: approaching the Myrra spaceport by wading through water and stepping onto the concrete dock, passing under metal walkways

entered.detail: weathered sci-fi structures with curved roofs and industrial detailing
raised concrete landing area with metal railings at the water's edge
elevated metal catwalks and pipes connecting the port buildings
tall cylindrical tower structure rising above the port buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to Myrra Spaceport, with industrial buildings and metal walkways replacing the ancient ruins. The character continues through the water past lily pads, with the concrete dock platform becoming prominent. The scene ends as the character steps onto the solid concrete surface of the spaceport dock, completing the transition from wilderness to civilization.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty alien wetland that gradually transforms into a structured industrial spaceport. It begins with a wide view of tropical vegetation and distant mountains, panning right to reveal monumental stone arches before the character begins walking forward through the shallow water. As the character progresses through these sacred ruins, the environment shifts from natural greenery and rising mist toward the distant silhouette of the settlement of Myrra. The scene then expands as industrial buildings and metal walkways replace the ancient stone, with the character gliding past lily pads toward a concrete dock. Finally, the transition from wilderness to civilization is completed as the character steps off the water and onto the solid surface of the spaceport.
